movie.title: The Devil Wears Prada 2 (2026) WEB-DL 480p, 720p & 1080p | GDRive | ESub
movie.synopsis: Andy Sachs returns to Runway as Miranda Priestly navigates a new media landscape and Runway’s position within. The duo reconnect with former assistant Emily Charlton, now the head of a luxury brand that possesses funding which could ensure Runway’s survival.
